verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Tests green; Docs published; Invariant conformance recorded; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red against the pre-delivery surface (engine absent), green at HEAD (4/4)
gate_result.tests_evidence: The full T2 gate set is green: 20/20 tests across seven spec files (archbp-065..071) — flake build, enter lifecycle, teardown, durable binds, resource hooks, multi-envelope, acceptance.
gate_result.docs_evidence: envelope/README.md is published beside the engine in the yazelix repo (PR #103): subcommands, options, the honest-executor contract, and the invariant conformance table.
gate_result.conformance_evidence: Conformance against the T1 ledger is recorded and re-proven live: I03 (private user/pid namespaces, bwrap userspace executor, no hypervisor), I05/I06 (durable state only via explicit binds to durable-tier paths, nothing durable on host /run — the engine contains no /run bind), I11/I12 (on-demand acquire, clean release), I13 (host never modified). The acceptance seal re-runs enter -> observe -> exit -> leakcheck clean.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The acceptance spec executes live envelopes and validates the published documentation artifact.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-071 is complete: the T2 envelope acceptance holds — the lane's test suite is green (20/20 across seven gates), the engine documentation is published in the yazelix repo, and conformance against the T1 invariant ledger (I03/I05/I06/I11/I12/I13) is recorded and re-proven by live envelope execution with a clean leakcheck seal.
